languages.text:
At the start of combat, Pasqal (or a random ally, if Pasqal is not in the current party) gains the {g|f:bee0d96b40b84f5da78bc3c9f41ec1fa}line of support{/g} effect.
While Eogunn stands in a straight or diagonal line to an ally affected by {g|f:bee0d96b40b84f5da78bc3c9f41ec1fa}line of support{/g} and that ally is within his {g|Encyclopedia:LineOfSight}line of sight{/g}, he gains +{unit_stat|WarhammerPerception|bonus} to all {g|Encyclopedia:Characteristic}characteristics{/g} except {g|Encyclopedia:WarhammerPerception}Perception{/g}.
If Eogunn starts his {g|Encyclopedia:Turn}turn{/g} in such a position, he also gains +1 stacks of {g|f:ad5bda1047bf4e4dafa278f87d07c5ad}potential energy{/g}.
This effect works even if that ally is {g|Encyclopedia:UnconsciousEffect}unconscious{/g}.

traits.locale_text:
At the start of combat, Pasqal (or a random ally, if Pasqal is not in the current party) gains the {g|f:bee0d96b40b84f5da78bc3c9f41ec1fa}line of support{/g} effect.

This effect works even if that ally is unconscious.

While Eogunn stands in a straight or diagonal line to an ally affected by {g|f:bee0d96b40b84f5da78bc3c9f41ec1fa}line of support{/g} and that ally is within his line of sight, he gains +{unit_stat|WarhammerPerception|bonus} to all characteristics except Perception.
If Eogunn starts his turn in such a position, he also accumulates +{unit_stat|WarhammerPerception|bonus} stacks of {g|f:ad5bda1047bf4e4dafa278f87d07c5ad}potential energy{/g}.
This effect works even if that ally is unconscious.

While Eogunn stands in a straight or diagonal line to an ally affected by {g|f:bee0d96b40b84f5da78bc3c9f41ec1fa}line of support{/g} and that ally is within his {g|Encyclopedia:LineOfSight}line of sight{/g}, he gains +{unit_stat|WarhammerPerception|bonus} to all {g|Encyclopedia:Characteristic}characteristics{/g} except {g|Encyclopedia:WarhammerPerception}Perception{/g}.

This effect works even if that ally is {g|Encyclopedia:UnconsciousEffect}unconscious{/g}.

languages.text:
В начале боя Паскаль (или случайный союзник, если Паскаля нет в текущей группе) получает эффект {g|f:bee0d96b40b84f5da78bc3c9f41ec1fa}линия поддержки{/g}.
Пока Эоганн стоит на прямой или диагональной линии с союзником, находящимся под эффектом {g|f:bee0d96b40b84f5da78bc3c9f41ec1fa}линия поддержки{/g}, и этот союзник находится в его {g|Encyclopedia:LineOfSight}зоне видимости{/g}, Эоганн получает +{unit_stat|WarhammerPerception|bonus} ко всем {g|Encyclopedia:Characteristic}характеристикам{/g}, кроме {g|Encyclopedia:WarhammerPerception}Восприятия{/g}.
Если Эоганн начинает свой {g|Encyclopedia:Turn}ход{/g} в такой позиции, он также получает 1 уровень {g|f:ad5bda1047bf4e4dafa278f87d07c5ad}потенциальной энергии{/g}.
Эффект срабатывает, даже если этот союзник {g|Encyclopedia:UnconsciousEffect}без сознания{/g}.

While Eogunn stands in a straight or diagonal line to an ally affected by {g|f:bee0d96b40b84f5da78bc3c9f41ec1fa}line of support{/g} and that ally is within his {g|Encyclopedia:LineOfSight}line of sight{/g}, he gains +{unit_stat|WarhammerPerception|bonus} to all {g|Encyclopedia:Characteristic}characteristics{/g} except {g|Encyclopedia:WarhammerPerception}Perception{/g}.
If Eogunn starts his {g|Encyclopedia:Turn}turn{/g} in such a position, he also gains +1 stack of {g|f:ad5bda1047bf4e4dafa278f87d07c5ad}potential energy{/g}.
This effect works even if that ally is {g|Encyclopedia:UnconsciousEffect}unconscious{/g}.

traits.locale_text:
В начале боя Паскаль (или случайный союзник, если Паскаля нет в текущей группе) получает эффект {g|f:bee0d96b40b84f5da78bc3c9f41ec1fa}линия поддержки{/g}.
Пока Эоганн стоит на прямой или диагональной линии с союзником, находящимся под эффектом {g|f:bee0d96b40b84f5da78bc3c9f41ec1fa}линия поддержки{/g}, и этот союзник находится в его {g|Encyclopedia:LineOfSight}линии обзора{/g}, Эоганн получает +{unit_stat|WarhammerPerception|bonus} ко всем {g|Encyclopedia:Characteristic}характеристикам{/g}, кроме {g|Encyclopedia:WarhammerPerception}Восприятия{/g}.
Если Эоганн начинает свой {g|Encyclopedia:Turn}ход{/g} в такой позиции, он также накапливает {g|f:ad5bda1047bf4e4dafa278f87d07c5ad}потенциальную энергию{/g} (+{unit_stat|WarhammerPerception|bonus}).
Эффект срабатывает, даже если этот союзник {g|Encyclopedia:UnconsciousEffect}без сознания{/g}.

В начале боя Паскаль (или случайный союзник, если Паскаля нет в текущей группе) получает эффект {g|f:bee0d96b40b84f5da78bc3c9f41ec1fa}линия поддержки{/g}.
Пока Эоганн стоит на прямой или диагональной линии с союзником, находящимся под эффектом {g|f:bee0d96b40b84f5da78bc3c9f41ec1fa}линия поддержки{/g}, и этот союзник находится в его {g|Encyclopedia:LineOfSight}линии обзора{/g}, Эоганн получает +{unit_stat|WarhammerPerception|bonus} ко всем {g|Encyclopedia:Characteristic}характеристикам{/g}, кроме {g|Encyclopedia:WarhammerPerception}Восприятия{/g}.
Если Эоганн начинает свой {g|Encyclopedia:Turn}ход{/g} в такой позиции, он также накапливает {g|f:ad5bda1047bf4e4dafa278f87d07c5ad}потенциальную энергию{/g} (+{unit_stat|WarhammerPerception|bonus}).
Эффект срабатывает, даже если этот союзник {g|Encyclopedia:UnconsciousEffect}без сознания{/g}.

languages.text:
Al comienzo del combate, Pasqal (o un aliado aleatorio si Pasqal no forma parte del grupo actual) gana el efecto {g|f:bee0d96b40b84f5da78bc3c9f41ec1fa}línea de apoyo{/g}.
Mientras Eogunn esté situado en una línea recta o diagonal con respecto a un aliado afectado por {g|f:bee0d96b40b84f5da78bc3c9f41ec1fa}línea de apoyo{/g} y dicho aliado esté dentro de su {g|Encyclopedia:LineOfSight}línea de visión{/g}, Eogunn gana +{unit_stat|WarhammerPerception|bonus} a todas sus {g|Encyclopedia:Characteristic}características{/g} excepto {g|Encyclopedia:WarhammerPerception}Percepción{/g}.
Si Eogunn empieza su {g|Encyclopedia:Turn}turno{/g} en esa posición, también obtiene +1 acumulación de {g|f:ad5bda1047bf4e4dafa278f87d07c5ad}energía potencial{/g}.
Este efecto se aplica incluso aunque el aliado esté {g|Encyclopedia:UnconsciousEffect}inconsciente{/g}.

While Eogunn stands in a straight or diagonal line to an ally affected by {g|f:bee0d96b40b84f5da78bc3c9f41ec1fa}line of support{/g} and that ally is within his {g|Encyclopedia:LineOfSight}line of sight{/g}, he gains +{unit_stat|WarhammerPerception|bonus} to all {g|Encyclopedia:Characteristic}characteristics{/g} except {g|Encyclopedia:WarhammerPerception}Perception{/g}.
If Eogunn starts his {g|Encyclopedia:Turn}turn{/g} in such a position, he also gains +1 stack of {g|f:ad5bda1047bf4e4dafa278f87d07c5ad}potential energy{/g}.
This effect works even if that ally is {g|Encyclopedia:UnconsciousEffect}unconscious{/g}.

Al comienzo del combate, Pasqal (o un aliado aleatorio si Pasqal no forma parte del grupo actual) gana el efecto {g|f:bee0d96b40b84f5da78bc3c9f41ec1fa}línea de apoyo{/g}.
Mientras Eogunn esté situado en una línea recta o diagonal con respecto a un aliado afectado por {g|f:bee0d96b40b84f5da78bc3c9f41ec1fa}línea de apoyo{/g} y dicho aliado esté dentro de su {g|Encyclopedia:LineOfSight}línea de visión{/g}, Eogunn gana +{unit_stat|WarhammerPerception|bonus} a todas sus {g|Encyclopedia:Characteristic}características{/g} excepto {g|Encyclopedia:WarhammerPerception}Percepción{/g}.
Si Eogunn empieza su {g|Encyclopedia:Turn}turno{/g} en esa posición, también obtiene +1 acumulación de {g|f:ad5bda1047bf4e4dafa278f87d07c5ad}energía potencial{/g}.
Este efecto se aplica incluso aunque el aliado esté {g|Encyclopedia:UnconsciousEffect}inconsciente{/g}.

languages.text:
Zu Beginn des Kampfes erhält Pasqal (oder ein anderer Verbündeter, wenn Pasqal der aktuellen Gruppe nicht angehört) den Effekt {g|f:bee0d96b40b84f5da78bc3c9f41ec1fa}Unterstützungslinie{/g}.
Wenn Eogunn in einer geraden oder diagonalen Linie zu einem mit {g|f:bee0d96b40b84f5da78bc3c9f41ec1fa}Unterstützungslinie{/g} belegten Verbündeten steht und sich dieser Verbündete in seiner {g|Encyclopedia:LineOfSight}Sichtlinie{/g} befindet, erhält er +{unit_stat|WarhammerPerception|bonus} auf alle {g|Encyclopedia:Characteristic}Eigenschaften{/g} mit Ausnahme von {g|Encyclopedia:WarhammerPerception}Wahrnehmung{/g}.
Beginnt Eogunn seinen {g|Encyclopedia:Turn}Zug{/g} in einer derartigen Position, erhält er außerdem +1 Stapel {g|f:ad5bda1047bf4e4dafa278f87d07c5ad}Potenzialenergie{/g}.
Dieser Effekt wirkt auch bei {g|Encyclopedia:UnconsciousEffect}bewusstlosen{/g} Verbündeten.
languages.original_text:
At the start of combat, Pasqal (or a random ally, if Pasqal is not in the current party) gains the {g|f:bee0d96b40b84f5da78bc3c9f41ec1fa}line of support{/g} effect.
While Eogunn stands in a straight or diagonal line to an ally affected by {g|f:bee0d96b40b84f5da78bc3c9f41ec1fa}line of support{/g} and that ally is within his {g|Encyclopedia:LineOfSight}line of sight{/g}, he gains +{unit_stat|WarhammerPerception|bonus} to all {g|Encyclopedia:Characteristic}characteristics{/g} except {g|Encyclopedia:WarhammerPerception}Perception{/g}.
If Eogunn starts his {g|Encyclopedia:Turn}turn{/g} in such a position, he also gains +1 stack of {g|f:ad5bda1047bf4e4dafa278f87d07c5ad}potential energy{/g}.
This effect works even if that ally is {g|Encyclopedia:UnconsciousEffect}unconscious{/g}.

Beginnt Eogunn seinen {g|Encyclopedia:Turn}Zug{/g} in einer derartigen Position, erhält er außerdem +1 Stapel {g|f:ad5bda1047bf4e4dafa278f87d07c5ad}Potenzialenergie{/g}.
Dieser Effekt wirkt auch bei {g|Encyclopedia:UnconsciousEffect}bewusstlosen{/g} Verbündeten.

languages.text:
Pasqal (Pasqal mevcut grupta yer almıyorsa da rastgele bir dost birim), çatışmanın başlangıcında {g|f:bee0d96b40b84f5da78bc3c9f41ec1fa}destek hattı{/g} etkisini kazanır.
Eogunn {g|f:bee0d96b40b84f5da78bc3c9f41ec1fa}destek hattı{/g} etkisindeki bir dost birimle arasında düz veya çapraz bir hat oluşturursa ve o dost birim Eogunn'un {g|Encyclopedia:LineOfSight}görüş hattındaysa{/g} Eogunn, {g|Encyclopedia:WarhammerPerception}Algı{/g} hariç tüm {g|Encyclopedia:Characteristic}niteliklerine{/g} +{unit_stat|WarhammerPerception|bonus} kazanır.
Eogunn, {g|Encyclopedia:Turn}turuna{/g} böyle bir konumda başlarsa ayrıca +1 {g|f:ad5bda1047bf4e4dafa278f87d07c5ad}potansiyel enerji{/g} birikimi kazanır.
Bu etki, o dost birim {g|Encyclopedia:UnconsciousEffect}baygın{/g} olsa bile işler.
languages.original_text:
At the start of combat, Pasqal (or a random ally, if Pasqal is not in the current party) gains the {g|f:bee0d96b40b84f5da78bc3c9f41ec1fa}line of support{/g} effect.
While Eogunn stands in a straight or diagonal line to an ally affected by {g|f:bee0d96b40b84f5da78bc3c9f41ec1fa}line of support{/g} and that ally is within his {g|Encyclopedia:LineOfSight}line of sight{/g}, he gains +{unit_stat|WarhammerPerception|bonus} to all {g|Encyclopedia:Characteristic}characteristics{/g} except {g|Encyclopedia:WarhammerPerception}Perception{/g}.
If Eogunn starts his {g|Encyclopedia:Turn}turn{/g} in such a position, he also gains +1 stack of {g|f:ad5bda1047bf4e4dafa278f87d07c5ad}potential energy{/g}.
This effect works even if that ally is {g|Encyclopedia:UnconsciousEffect}unconscious{/g}.

traits.locale_text:
Pasqal (Pasqal mevcut grupta yer almıyorsa da rastgele bir dost birim), çatışmanın başlangıcında {g|f:bee0d96b40b84f5da78bc3c9f41ec1fa}destek hattı{/g} etkisini kazanır.
Eogunn {g|f:bee0d96b40b84f5da78bc3c9f41ec1fa}destek hattı{/g} etkisindeki bir dost birimle arasında düz veya çapraz bir hat oluşturursa ve o dost birim Eogunn'un {g|Encyclopedia:LineOfSight}görüş hattındaysa{/g} Eogunn, {g|Encyclopedia:WarhammerPerception}Algı{/g} hariç tüm {g|Encyclopedia:Characteristic}niteliklerine{/g} +{unit_stat|WarhammerPerception|bonus} kazanır.
Eogunn, {g|Encyclopedia:Turn}turuna{/g} böyle bir konumda başlarsa ayrıca +1 {g|f:ad5bda1047bf4e4dafa278f87d07c5ad}potansiyel enerji{/g} birikimi kazanır.
Bu etki, o dost birim {g|Encyclopedia:UnconsciousEffect}baygın{/g} olsa bile işler.

languages.text:
Au début du combat, Pasqal (ou un allié aléatoire si ce dernier ne fait pas partie du groupe actuel) bénéficie de l'effet {g|f:bee0d96b40b84f5da78bc3c9f41ec1fa}Ligne de soutien{/g}.
Tant qu'Eogunn occupe une case située en ligne droite ou en diagonale par rapport à un allié affecté par {g|f:bee0d96b40b84f5da78bc3c9f41ec1fa}Ligne de soutien{/g} et que cet allié se trouve dans sa {g|Encyclopedia:LineOfSight}ligne de mire{/g}, il gagne un bonus de +{unit_stat|WarhammerPerception|bonus} à toutes les {g|Encyclopedia:Characteristic}caractéristiques{/g}, sauf à la {g|Encyclopedia:WarhammerPerception}Perception{/g}.
Si Eogunn commence son {g|Encyclopedia:Turn}tour{/g} dans une telle position, il obtient également 1 cumul d'{g|f:ad5bda1047bf4e4dafa278f87d07c5ad}Énergie potentielle{/g}.
Cet effet fonctionne même si l'allié {g|Encyclopedia:UnconsciousEffect}perd connaissance{/g}.

While Eogunn stands in a straight or diagonal line to an ally affected by {g|f:bee0d96b40b84f5da78bc3c9f41ec1fa}line of support{/g} and that ally is within his {g|Encyclopedia:LineOfSight}line of sight{/g}, he gains +{unit_stat|WarhammerPerception|bonus} to all {g|Encyclopedia:Characteristic}characteristics{/g} except {g|Encyclopedia:WarhammerPerception}Perception{/g}.

languages.text:
战斗开始时，帕斯卡（若帕斯卡不在当前队伍中，则为随机一名盟友）获得{g|f:bee0d96b40b84f5da78bc3c9f41ec1fa}支援阵线{/g}效果。
当伊奥贡与受{g|f:bee0d96b40b84f5da78bc3c9f41ec1fa}支援阵线{/g}影响的盟友处于同一直线或对角线上，且该盟友在其{g|Encyclopedia:LineOfSight}视线{/g}内时，伊奥贡除{g|Encyclopedia:WarhammerPerception}感知{/g}外的所有{g|Encyclopedia:Characteristic}属性{/g}提高{unit_stat|WarhammerPerception|bonus}点。
如果伊奥贡在这样的位置开始{g|Encyclopedia:Turn}回合{/g}，他还会获得1层{g|f:ad5bda1047bf4e4dafa278f87d07c5ad}势能{/g}。
即使该盟友处于{g|Encyclopedia:UnconsciousEffect}昏迷{/g}状态，此效果依然生效。
languages.original_text:
At the start of combat, Pasqal (or a random ally, if Pasqal is not in the current party) gains the {g|f:bee0d96b40b84f5da78bc3c9f41ec1fa}line of support{/g} effect.
While Eogunn stands in a straight or diagonal line to an ally affected by {g|f:bee0d96b40b84f5da78bc3c9f41ec1fa}line of support{/g} and that ally is within his {g|Encyclopedia:LineOfSight}line of sight{/g}, he gains +{unit_stat|WarhammerPerception|bonus} to all {g|Encyclopedia:Characteristic}characteristics{/g} except {g|Encyclopedia:WarhammerPerception}Perception{/g}.
If Eogunn starts his {g|Encyclopedia:Turn}turn{/g} in such a position, he also gains +1 stack of {g|f:ad5bda1047bf4e4dafa278f87d07c5ad}potential energy{/g}.
This effect works even if that ally is {g|Encyclopedia:UnconsciousEffect}unconscious{/g}.

traits.locale_text:
战斗开始时，帕斯卡（若帕斯卡不在当前队伍中，则为随机一名盟友）获得{g|f:bee0d96b40b84f5da78bc3c9f41ec1fa}支援阵线{/g}效果。
当伊奥贡与受{g|f:bee0d96b40b84f5da78bc3c9f41ec1fa}支援阵线{/g}影响的盟友处于同一直线或对角线上，且该盟友在其{g|Encyclopedia:LineOfSight}视线{/g}内时，伊奥贡除{g|Encyclopedia:WarhammerPerception}感知{/g}外的所有{g|Encyclopedia:Characteristic}属性{/g}提高{unit_stat|WarhammerPerception|bonus}点。
如果伊奥贡在这样的位置开始{g|Encyclopedia:Turn}回合{/g}，他还会获得1层{g|f:ad5bda1047bf4e4dafa278f87d07c5ad}势能{/g}。
即使该盟友处于{g|Encyclopedia:UnconsciousEffect}昏迷{/g}状态，此效果依然生效。

languages.text:
戦闘開始時、Pasqal（またはPasqalが現在のパーティにいない場合、ランダムな味方1人）は{g|f:bee0d96b40b84f5da78bc3c9f41ec1fa}ライン・オブ・サポート{/g} の効果を得る。
Eogunn が{g|f:bee0d96b40b84f5da78bc3c9f41ec1fa}ライン・オブ・サポート{/g} の効果を受ける味方と直線または対角線上に立ち、その味方が彼の{g|Encyclopedia:LineOfSight}視線{/g} 内にいる間、彼は{g|Encyclopedia:Characteristic}特性{/g} のうち{g|Encyclopedia:WarhammerPerception}知覚{/g} を除くすべての特性に＋{unit_stat|WarhammerPerception|bonus} を得る。
Eogunn がそのような位置で自分の{g|Encyclopedia:Turn}ターン{/g} を開始した場合、彼は{g|f:ad5bda1047bf4e4dafa278f87d07c5ad}潜在エネルギー{/g} も +{unit_stat|WarhammerPerception|bonus} スタック蓄積する。
この効果は、その味方が{g|Encyclopedia:UnconsciousEffect}意識不明{/g} であっても機能する。
languages.original_text:
At the start of combat, Pasqal (or a random ally, if Pasqal is not in the current party) gains the {g|f:bee0d96b40b84f5da78bc3c9f41ec1fa}line of support{/g} effect.
While Eogunn stands in a straight or diagonal line to an ally affected by {g|f:bee0d96b40b84f5da78bc3c9f41ec1fa}line of support{/g} and that ally is within his {g|Encyclopedia:LineOfSight}line of sight{/g}, he gains +{unit_stat|WarhammerPerception|bonus} to all {g|Encyclopedia:Characteristic}characteristics{/g} except {g|Encyclopedia:WarhammerPerception}Perception{/g}.
If Eogunn starts his {g|Encyclopedia:Turn}turn{/g} in such a position, he also accumulates +{unit_stat|WarhammerPerception|bonus} stacks of {g|f:ad5bda1047bf4e4dafa278f87d07c5ad}potential energy{/g}.
This effect works even if that ally is {g|Encyclopedia:UnconsciousEffect}unconscious{/g}.
